conventiondeclaration.abbr: Finding aid prepared according to <title xlink:type="simple" render="italic">Describing Archives: A Content Standard (DACS)</title>.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday September 18, 2018 at 23:13
Transformed with yale.addEadidUrl.xsl. Adds @url with handle for finding aid. Overwrites @url if already present.

did.abstract: Collection consists of mounted black and white and color reproductions of artistic photographs. Content varies from original photographic prints to reproductions from magazines and other published sources. Some sections have accompanying clippings folders.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright has not been transferred to Yale University. Further use of this material may be subject to the copyright laws of the United States (Title 17, United States Code) or to site license or other rights management terms or conditions.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: History of Photography Collection, Arts Library, Yale University

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Collection consists of mounted black and white and color reproductions of artistic photographs. Content varies from original photographic prints to reproductions from magazines and other published sources. Some sections have accompanying clippings folders.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The photographs are arranged alphabetically by country. Further arranged by individual artist name.

odd.head: General
odd.p: Includes three folders of miscellaneous clippings

odd.head: General
odd.p: Includes a folder of miscellaneous clippings

odd.head: General
odd.p: Includes a folder of miscellaneous clippings

odd.p: Includes a folder of miscellaneous clippings

odd.p: Includes a folder of miscellaneous clippings

odd.p: Includes a folder of miscellaneous clippings

did.unittitle: T, U, V - Miscellaneous Artists [22 photographs]
